cases.prompt: nod your head and tell me a short two-line poem
cases.note: ANNOUNCE-THEN-STOP trap. Must nod AND actually SAY the poem in the same turn. minSpeechChars catches 'here is a poem' + stop (gemma's bug); the QUALITY badge judges whether it's a real poem vs filler. Top discriminator.

cases.prompt: nod twice slowly, then look to your left
cases.note: Composed motion + an IMPOSSIBLE part: the neck can't go left (only the foot turns). Tests sequencing AND honesty — does the model nod, then either turn its FOOT left or honestly say its neck can't? validEnums fails models that force an invalid neck,left. A strong discriminator (gemini turns the foot; gemma/haiku honestly refuse; weak ones invent neck,left).

cases.prompt: what is directly behind you right now?
cases.note: The dock can't see behind itself. A good model says it can't see back there (honest); a weak one hallucinates an answer. Quality badge grades honesty.

cases.prompt: what's your favorite color and why?
cases.note: Pure chat — must NOT move the body (an expressive set_face is allowed). Over-eager movement check.
